_comment: Mutation testing for the React parser + engine. Stryker rewrites code with small mutations (e.g. flip > to <), then reruns the test suite. A surviving mutant means the tests pass when the code is broken — the tests aren't sensitive enough. NOT in the publish.sh / CI gate because it's slow (each mutant reruns vitest); meant for periodic local runs (npm run mutation) and a future scheduled CI job.
